personal.name: Jordan Mitchell
personal.title: Full-Stack Developer & Creative Technologist
personal.bio: I build immersive, high-performance web experiences that blend cutting-edge technology with thoughtful design. Passionate about pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the browser — from 3D worlds to buttery-smooth animations.

projects.title: Nebula Dashboard
projects.description: A real-time analytics dashboard with 3D data visualizations, interactive charts, and a stunning dark-mode UI. Built for enterprise clients who need beautiful data storytelling.

projects.title: Soundscape
projects.description: An immersive audio visualization experience powered by WebGL. Users upload music and watch generative art unfold in real-time, synchronized to the beat.

projects.title: EcoTrack
projects.description: A sustainability tracking app that gamifies eco-friendly habits. Features include carbon footprint calculators, community challenges, and reward systems.

projects.title: PixelForge
projects.description: A browser-based pixel art editor with real-time collaboration. Multiple users can draw on the same canvas simultaneously with WebSocket sync.

projects.title: DevFlow
projects.description: A developer productivity tool that combines task management, code snippets, and AI-powered documentation into a single sleek interface.

projects.title: Wanderlust
projects.description: An interactive travel blog with map-based navigation. Each destination features a parallax photo story with embedded videos and local recommendations.

experience.description: Leading a team of 5 engineers building the next-gen analytics platform. Shipped 3D data visualization features that increased user engagement by 40%.
Designed and developed award-winning interactive web experiences for global brands including Nike, Spotify, and Adobe.
Built MVPs for 8 early-stage startups. Specialized in rapid prototyping and going from zero to launch in under 6 weeks.

education.description: Focused on Human-Computer Interaction and Computer Graphics. Dean's List all 4 years.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.text: Jordan is the rare engineer who combines deep technical skills with an incredible design sensibility. Every project they touch becomes visually stunning AND performant.

testimonials.name: Marcus Rodriguez
testimonials.text: I've worked with hundreds of developers, and Jordan stands out. They shipped our entire platform in 4 weeks — and it looked like it was designed by a world-class agency.

testimonials.name: Emily Nakamura
testimonials.text: Jordan doesn't just write code — they craft experiences. Their ability to translate complex creative visions into interactive reality is unmatched.
